Intelligent System Security (IS2) Lab
AboutMembersResearchPublicationsMISC

Research

We seek to do cutting-edge, high-quality, and impactful research combining theory and practice. As such, we are closely collaborating with our industrial partners including Huawei, Alibaba Group, and Ant Group to solve real-world challenging problems in an effective and scalable way.

AI System Analysis

Robustness Testing of Deep Learning Systems

  • Jingyi Wang, Jialuo Chen, Youcheng Sun, Xingjun Ma, Dongxia Wang, Jun Sun and Peng Cheng: “RobOT: Robustness-Oriented Testing for Deep Learning Systems”, ICSE 2021. [Paper, Code]

  • Jingyi Wang, Guoliang Dong, Jun Sun, Xinyu Wang and Zhang Peixin: “Adversarial Sample Detection for Deep Neural Network through Model Mutation Testing”, ICSE 2019. [Paper, Code]

Fairness Testing of Deep Learning Systems

  • Peixin Zhang, Jingyi Wang*, Jun Sun, Guoliang Dong, Xinyu Wang, Xingen Wang, Jin Song Dong and Dai Ting: “White-box Fairness Testing through Adversarial Sampling”, ICSE 2020. [Paper, Code]
  • Peixin Zhang, Jingyi Wang*, Jun Sun, Xinyu Wang, Guoliang Dong, Xinggen Wang, Ting Dai and Jin Song Dong: “Automatic Fairness Testing of Neural Classifiers through Adversarial Sampling”, TSE 2021. [Paper, Code]

Copyright Protection of Deep Learning Models

  • Jialuo Chen, Jingyi Wang*, Tinglan Peng, Youcheng Sun, Peng Cheng, Shouling Ji, Xingjun Ma, Bo Li and Dawn Song: “Copy, Right? A Testing Framework for Copyright Protection of Deep Learning Models”, IEEE S&P 2022. [Paper, Code]

***We are actively maintaining a paper list on this emerging research area here! We welcome interested researchers to help improve and contribute together!***

Lightweight Formal Methods & Program Analysis

Semantic-based Validation of Compilers

  • Kun Wang, Jingyi Wang*, Christopher M. Poskitt, Xiangxiang Chen, Jun Sun, Peng Cheng: “K-ST: A Formal Executable Semantics of PLC Structured Text Language”, TSE. (In submission) [Paper, Code]

AI-Empowered Program Analysis

  • Shunkai Zhu, Jingyi Wang*, Jun Sun, Jie Yang, Xingwei Lin, Liyi Zhang, Peng Cheng: “Better Pay Attention Whilst Fuzzing”, TSE. (In submission) [Paper, Code]

Semantic-based Equivalence Check of Database Query Optimizations (Ongoing)
